metadata.description: Editorial-style diagram rendering for Claude — architecture/C4, UML, ERD, flow, lane & grid diagrams as PNG/PDF/SVG from a compact spec.

plugins.name: editorial-diagrams
plugins.description: Render 33 diagram types (C4 L1–L4, flowchart, activity, state, ERD, class, sequence, git-workflow, gantt, timeline, matrix, kanban, swimlane…) in one consistent editorial style, via MCP.
